theme_and_archetype.mood: Grounded, reliable, energetic, and professional. Tailored for farmers and agri-business owners in India. The design must feel field-ready, high-contrast for outdoor sunlight readability, and trustworthy.

colors.primary_description: RKAI Orange - Used for primary CTAs (Buy Now, Add to Cart), alerts, and highlighting key features.
colors.secondary_description: Agriculture Green - Used for secondary buttons, success states, and emphasizing growth/trust.

typography.instructions: Use Outfit for all app headers, screen titles, and prominent product names. Use Manrope for product descriptions, specifications, and data fields.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: React Native Flexbox. Use 2-column FlatList for product catalogs. Use horizontal ScrollViews for featured items and news.
spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous spacing. Screen containers should have p-4 or p-6. Cards should have internal p-4.
spacing_and_layout.radius: Use rounded-2xl for main cards and product images. Use rounded-full for primary action buttons to make them easily tappable on mobile.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: Use subtle elevations: shadow-sm for lists, shadow-md for floating buttons or highlighted cards.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF6600] text-white font-bold rounded-full py-4 px-6 text-center items-center justify-center flex-row shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-[#2E7D32] text-white font-bold rounded-full py-4 px-6 text-center items-center justify-center flex-row
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#FF6600] text-[#FF6600] font-bold rounded-full py-4 px-6 text-center items-center justify-center flex-row

cards.product_card: bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm border border-gray-100 mb-4
cards.news_card: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 p-4 flex-row items-center space-x-4
cards.dashboard_widget: bg-white rounded-2xl p-4 shadow-sm border-l-4 border-[#2E7D32]

inputs.text_field: bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-base text-gray-900 focus:border-[#FF6600]

key_screens.splash_login: Full screen earthy/farm background image with a dark gradient overlay (bg-black/40). White RKAI logo in center. 'OUR CULTURE IS AGRICULTURE' in white Outfit font. Bright orange Login button.
key_screens.home_dashboard: Header with greeting and cart icon. Hero Swiper/Carousel showcasing latest tractor implements with orange/green banners. 'Quick Categories' (Tiller, Harrow, etc.) as circular icons in a horizontal scrolling list. 'Featured Products' horizontal cards. 'Latest News' stack at bottom.
key_screens.product_catalog: 2-column grid layout (FlatList numColumns=2). Each item has a square image, title, bold price, and a small '+' icon button in green.
key_screens.product_detail: Full-width image carousel at top. Title, Price, Ratings. Expandable accordion (or simple lists) for Specifications Table and Key Features. Sticky bottom bar with 'Add to Cart' and 'Buy Now'.
key_screens.warranty_tracker: List of purchased items. Selecting one shows a circular progress or thick horizontal progress bar indicating remaining warranty days (Green for active, Red for expired). Includes a 'Claim Warranty' button.
key_screens.cart_checkout: Clean list of cart items with increment/decrement steppers. Address form using standardized inputs. Checkout summary with a high-contrast Orange 'Confirm Payment' button.
key_screens.service_support: Simple form for raising tickets. Includes a camera icon button to attach photos of the broken machinery.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include a testID attribute in React Native (e.g., testID='login-submit-button').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text over images must use gradient overlays or textShadow properties in React Native to ensure readability in bright sunlight.
accessibility_and_testing.touch_targets: All tappable elements (buttons, links, icons) must be at least 44x44 points for ease of use in the field.

hero_tractor_sunset.description: Indian farmer driving a tractor at sunset
hero_tractor_sunset.usage: Splash screen background, or main hero carousel on dashboard.

farmers_on_tractor.description: Two men riding on a tractor in the field
farmers_on_tractor.usage: About Us or Community/News section banner.

heavy_machinery_1.description: Red tractor parked in a clearing
heavy_machinery_1.usage: Placeholder for Product Detail image (e.g., Harrow or Tiller context shot).

abstract_brand_texture.description: Abstract painting with orange and green colors
abstract_brand_texture.usage: Offers & Discounts background texture to add brand flavor.

instructions_to_main_agent: Since this is a React Native Expo application, strictly use React Native primitives (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, FlatList, Image).
Use NativeWind for styling. Map the Tailwind utility classes provided in the components section to the className props.
Do not use HTML elements like div, span, or web-only CSS properties.
Implement navigation using React Navigation (@react-navigation/native and @react-navigation/native-stack).
For icons, use @expo/vector-icons (Lucide, Feather, or MaterialCommunityIcons) which is built into Expo.
Ensure the app is fully accessible on mobile (touch targets >= 44px) and includes 'testID' (the React Native equivalent of data-testid) on all interactive elements.
Use a SafeAreaView to wrap the main screen contents to avoid notch overlapping.
Keep layouts field-ready: high contrast, big text, and avoid excessive transparent overlays that wash out in sunlight.
For the Warranty tracker progress bar, you can build a custom layout using nested Views with varying background colors and width percentages.
